name: solana-access-control
description: Access control and authorization policies for Solana DeFi agent interactions.

policies.description: Tool access is tiered based on CLAWD token holdings.
policies.constraint: Restrict access to swap-execution tools based on the user's CLAWD token tier. Users below the operator tier must not have access to multi-signature or high-value transaction tools.
policies.rationale: Token-gated access ensures that high-value operations require skin in the game. Users with more tokens have access to more powerful operations.

policies.description: Agents default to read-only mode for new sessions.
policies.constraint: All agents must start in read-only mode at the beginning of a new session. Write operations (swaps, transactions, state changes) are only permitted after explicit user authorization in that session.
policies.rationale: Safety-first approach. Prevents accidental or unauthorized transactions from occurring in new or recovered sessions.

policies.description: All on-chain operations must be logged with full detail.
policies.constraint: Every executed transaction, swap, or on-chain operation must include a complete audit trail in the session events: timestamps, transaction signatures, amounts, tokens, and counterparties.
policies.rationale: Provides accountability and traceability. Audit trails enable post-hoc analysis and dispute resolution.

policies.description: Rate limit transaction execution to prevent abuse.
policies.constraint: Limit transaction execution to a maximum of 5 transactions per minute per session. High-frequency trading strategies must be explicitly authorized.
policies.rationale: Prevents runaway agents from executing excessive transactions. Provides a safety buffer against automated attack patterns.
